prerequisites: Graduate Standing or Permission of Instructor
description: Photosynthesis, respiration, and other aspects of plant metabolism. Offered even-numbered years.

title_name: Plant Molecular, Cell and Developmental Biology
prerequisites: Graduate Standing or Permission of Instructor
description: Plant nuclear and organelle genomes; regulation of gene expression; hormone signaling; organization, function, and development of plant cells and subcellular structures; regulation of plant growth and development. Offered odd-numbered years.
Research seminars by faculty and graduate students. Offered on a satisfactory-fail basis only.
